title: ZeroPM science-policy webinar 7 - Update on the PFAS restriction proposal
author: Dannenburg, Carl
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The slides that were presneted at the 7th ZeroPM science - policy workshop held on the 8th of May 2025. The presentation was given by Carl Dannenburg from BaUA and had the title "Update on the PFAS restriction proposal". 
 Please note the slides represent the status at the time of the presentation - 8th May 2025, and future changes to any aspect of the universal PFAS restriction is beyond the control of the authour.
